title: megalastrum peregrinum
intro: Megalastrum peregrinum, a species of fern, is a type of plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Megalastrum peregrinum include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Megalastrum peregrinum are often made into teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal purposes, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential benefits and risks.
